purpose: R7 sourcing-scan capture for deterministic demo replay (VC-BRAIN-PLAN.md §0.5 d12 R7). The demo replays this capture; no live GitHub call on stage.
referenceTimeNote: Fixed 'now' anchor. scan-score.mjs computes days-since-created and days-since-push against this timestamp (NOT Date.now()) so reruns reproduce an identical ranking.
thesis: AI infra, developer tools, agents — surface pre-fundraise open-source projects with early traction.

queries.label: ai-agents
queries.command: gh search repos --topic ai-agents --created ">2026-01-01" --sort stars --order desc --limit 30 --json fullName,name,owner,stargazersCount,forksCount,createdAt,pushedAt,updatedAt,url,description,language,license,isArchived,openIssuesCount,hasIssues,watchersCount

queries.label: ai-infrastructure
queries.command: gh search repos --topic ai-infrastructure --created ">2026-01-01" --sort stars --order desc --limit 30 --json fullName,name,owner,stargazersCount,forksCount,createdAt,pushedAt,updatedAt,url,description,language,license,isArchived,openIssuesCount,hasIssues,watchersCount

queries.label: developer-tools + llm
queries.command: gh search repos --topic developer-tools --topic llm --created ">2026-01-01" --sort stars --order desc --limit 30 --json fullName,name,owner,stargazersCount,forksCount,createdAt,pushedAt,updatedAt,url,description,language,license,isArchived,openIssuesCount,hasIssues,watchersCount

queries.label: autonomous-agents
queries.command: gh search repos --topic autonomous-agents --created ">2026-01-01" --sort stars --order desc --limit 30 --json fullName,name,owner,stargazersCount,forksCount,createdAt,pushedAt,updatedAt,url,description,language,license,isArchived,openIssuesCount,hasIssues,watchersCount

signals.starVelocity: stargazersCount / max(1, daysSinceCreated) — traction rate, normalized to pool max

scoring.tiebreak: score desc, then fullName asc — fully deterministic
